last_context: Phase 1 Foundation complete. 20 feature specs, 13 data entities. Moving to Phase 2 — Screens.

flagged_concerns: Auto-Summarize context overflow requires separate API call costing tokens
Text completion APIs being deprecated by some providers
Artifact generation mechanism needs architectural decision
Search implementation approach needs architectural decision
Terminal execution security model needs review
WebSocket server security model needs review
Global keyboard hooks may trigger antivirus false positives
VACUUM requires temporary free disk space equal to database size
Rich text bidirectional text rendering complexity
Google Cloud Storage dependency for backups
